ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "bill_number" TEXT /* Bill number assigned by the legislative body */,
  "bill_title" TEXT /* Title of the bill */,
  "legislators" TEXT /* Names of the legislators sponsoring the bill */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the committee assigned to the bill */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the legislative session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bill (e.g., introduced, passed, vetoed) */,
  "introduced_date" TEXT /* Date the bill was introduced */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the bill was last updated */,
  "sponsors_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sponsors table */,
  "hearing_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled hearing */,
  "voting_results" TEXT /* Summary of voting results */,
  "related_documents" TEXT /* URLs or references to related documents */,
  "public_engagement" INTEGER /* Reference to the public engagement table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_sponsors_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsors_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_public_engagement FOREIGN KEY ("public_engagement") REFERENCES public_engagement ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES legislative_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "chairperson" TEXT /* Name of the chairperson of the committee */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the committee's responsibilities */,
  "members" TEXT /* List of committee members */,
  "meeting_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of committee meetings */,
  "meeting_agendas" TEXT /* URLs or references to meeting agendas */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legislators" (
  "legislator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legislator */,
  "legislator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the legislator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the legislator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the legislator */,
  "district" TEXT /* District the legislator represents */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party affiliation */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise */,
  "committees" TEXT /* Committees the legislator is part of */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the legislator's profile image */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the legislator's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("legislator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public comment */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bill the comment is about */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the public comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the users table */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user who submitted the comment */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email of the user who submitted the comment */,
  "moderation_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the moderators regarding the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_comments_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legislative_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legislative session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the session */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the session */,
  "key_initiatives" TEXT /* Key initiatives or focus areas for the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., regular, special) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "legislator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the legislators table */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bills table */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the sponsor (e.g., primary, co-sponsor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_legislator_id FOREIGN KEY ("legislator_id") REFERENCES legislators ("legislator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bills table */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement metric (e.g., comments, likes, shares) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_engagement_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public, staff, legislator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
